changelog: Other orders now load from Printify — tries every feed URL until orders appear, auto-opens Printify to capture the feed if needed.
Fixes empty Other orders tab when Printify shows orders in the browser.
Stops creating duplicate Studio Placement preview products — reuses one live preview and sweeps orphans daily.
Reinstall once for the desktop shell fix (capture + API headers).
